title: navigator_assay_aggregate.py silent crash: sub_agents string type guard missing
summary: navigator_assay_aggregate.py crashed silently every nightly run since authoring. Root cause: sub_agents field in assay_full.json is sometimes a list of strings (['Explore']) rather than dicts. Script called sa.get('model') on a string → AttributeError. run_post_tend_chain() catches all failures as non-blocking WARN, so assay-patterns.json stayed empty and assay_sessions_incorporated=0 in all recommendations. Fix: add 'if not isinstance(sa, dict): continue' guard before sa.get() calls. After fix: 10 sessions processed, claude-sonnet-4-6 lifted to 0.55 local_success_fit on coding/planning slots.

patch.change: Add isinstance(sa, dict) guard before sa.get('model') in sub-agent loop

pattern: When iterating mixed-type lists from JSON (tools, sub_agents, tags), always guard isinstance before calling dict methods.
audit_note: Confirmed delivered to hub WAI-Spoke/lugs/bytype/signal/delivered/ — closed by audit task-track-rebuild-audit-20260527
decision_reason: Already marked delivered. Audit note: Confirmed delivered to hub WAI-Spoke/lugs/bytype/signal/delivered/ — closed by a
